trivia_bullets.text: First printed in Kaladesh (KLD, September 2016), a plane built around fabrication economies: cogwork automatons, thopters, and workshop constructs are the ambient labor infrastructure of the plane's inventor culture. Reprinted in Commander Legends (CMR, November 2020) and Kaladesh Remastered (KLR) — three total printings.

On death, return another target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. Functions as a recurring recursion loop piece in artifact-heavy builds. EDHREC rank 3,794 — consistent inclusion across Commander and Pauper artifact decks. Legal in Pauper, Paupercommander, Modern, Pioneer, Legacy, Commander.
"Sometimes the smallest things make the biggest difference." — no named speaker.

On Kaladesh, constructs like Workshop Assistant are part of the plane's engineered labor class — created by inventors to assist in fabrication, maintenance, and aether-refinement. The plane's design brief described cogwork automatons as ambient infrastructure, the labor layer that makes the Inventors' Fair possible.
